tutoring.name: Subject Area Tutoring (ASN)
tutoring.booking: No appointment needed. Drop-in only. Bring ASU Sun Card.
tutoring.booking_tool: TracCloud at trac.asu.edu to search for tutors by course
tutoring.queue_system: Check in with desk aide, submit name to queueing system, tutor comes to you
tutoring.what_to_bring: ASU Sun Card, notes, textbooks, calculators, paper, pencils
tutoring.cannot_help_with: Take-home tests, quizzes, graded assessments (unless instructor gives written permission)

tempe.name: HAV Evening Tutoring, MSHAL HAV F101

fulton_engineering_tutoring.name: Fulton Schools Engineering Tutoring Centers (FSETC)
fulton_engineering_tutoring.subjects: Physics, Math, Computer Science, various Engineering disciplines

locations.name: ECG 152 (Engineering courses: Aerospace, BME, ChemE, Civil, EE, IE, MSE, ME, Math, Physics)

fulton_engineering_tutoring.virtual: Available via Zoom, same queue as in-person

checkin_process: Walk into any tutoring center with your ASU Sun Card
Check in with the desk aide at the front
Submit your name to the queueing system
A tutor will be with you as soon as possible
You may work in small groups with a tutor
Tutors are fellow students, not professors
expectations: Tutors are students too — they may not know every answer
Come prepared with specific questions and concepts
Tutors cannot help with graded assessments unless instructor gives written permission
Tutors review concepts and work through practice problems
Tutoring is not a substitute for class attendance

counseling.name: ASU Counseling Services
counseling.cost: Free for all currently enrolled ASU students

how_to_access: Download the TELUS Health Student Support app
Fill in your name, preferred language, and consent
Your home screen offers Open Call, Chat, scheduling, mental health articles, and screening tools

appointment_scheduling.method: My Health Portal or call the office
appointment_scheduling.same_day: Same day in-person and telehealth appointments available — call the office
appointment_scheduling.scheduled: Scheduled consults available Mon-Fri on My Health Portal
appointment_scheduling.telehealth: Available anywhere in the world, including non-traditional hours

what_to_expect: You do not need to be in crisis to use counseling
Same-day availability is guaranteed — you will always have a clinician available
First visit is an initial consultation to understand your needs
Services are matched to your specific care pathway

advising.name: Academic Advising
advising.overview: Each ASU college has its own advising center. Fulton Engineering uses fultonapps.asu.edu/advising/

steps: Select 'Current Student' (or 'Prospective Student' if no ASU ID)
Log in with your ASURITE User ID and Password
Select your program from the dropdown
Select your academic advisor from the dropdown menu
Click 'Make Appointment' and enter requested information
Confirmation email will be sent to your ASU email
fulton_scheduling.online_students: Schedule during designated Online Student time slots, or call 480-727-3520

scai_advising.tempe_address: Centerpoint, Suite 105, 660 S. Mill Ave, Tempe, AZ 85281
scai_advising.poly_address: Picacho Hall, Suite 245, 7151 E. Sonoran Arroyo Mall, Mesa, AZ 85212

express_advising.description: Walk-in, first come first served during peak times (start of fall/spring semesters)
express_advising.intended_for: Quick questions, routine check-ins, time-sensitive issues
express_advising.time_limit: 15 minutes — longer meetings should be scheduled as appointments

first_year_students.nest_program: Nurturing Entering Students through Teaching — specialized first-year advisors
first_year_students.requirement: Required to meet with advisor during first two semesters to be eligible to register
first_year_students.orientation: First-year students meet advisor at New Student Experience orientation

continuing_students.soar_program: Success Outreach and Advising for Returning students
continuing_students.recommendation: Meet with advisor minimum once per year (not required after first two semesters)

what_to_discuss: Creating a personalized four-year study plan
Checking if you are on track for graduation
preparation_tips: Be ready to discuss your situation, plans, and goals with an open mind
Be honest with your advisor and yourself
Prepare information relevant to your goals for the meeting
Ask questions — this is your chance to find out everything about your situation at ASU
Find your principal advisor on My ASU → 'Academic Advising' link in Academic Support Team box

writing_center.name: ASU Graduate Writing Centers
steps: Search for appointment availability through TracCloud dashboard
Choose in-person location or online via Zoom
Receive confirmation email at ASU email
writing_center.drop_in: Available on first-come first-served basis, 5-20 minute sessions
